heroDesc: 30 minutes. No templates, no decks, no sales pitch. Just a focused conversation about your brand, your growth, and what's actually blocking you.

expectations.title: You talk, I listen
expectations.body: First 10 minutes are yours. Tell me where you are, what's not working, and what you actually want to achieve.

expectations.title: I diagnose, honestly
expectations.body: I'll tell you what I see, including if I'm not the right fit. No false positives to land a deal.

expectations.title: You leave with clarity
expectations.body: Whether we work together or not, you'll have a clearer picture of what to do next. That's the minimum outcome.
